subject: Correct input yaml file name for Holmes Rules Eng
commit_message:
Correct input yaml file name for Holmes Rules Eng

additional changes:
1. Delete dcae_ns setting in values files--forces
   CM to deploy into the common namespace.
2. Conditionally set image name in k8s-inventory-inputs.yaml
3. Comment out componentImage setting--use image version
   specified in blueprints.
4. Add missing "---" in CM templates/service.yaml
5. Update image versions for bootstrap, healtcheck

changes to values.yaml file:
1. update doker versions
2. use onap as namespace for DCAE pods
Chages to dcae-healthcheck values.yaml file
1. check health for DACE pods under namespace onap

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-479
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-490
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-493
Change-Id: I40d8f0b40b2b6bbf1407493a7d8c03cef856fd9c
Signed-off-by: Lusheng Ji <lji@research.att.com>
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>

Patch Set 3: Published edit on patch set 2.

Patch Set 3:

Please wait for Jack Lucas comments

Patch Set 3:

(2 comments)

What is the rationale for the namespace change?

I think it's also necessary to unset dcae_ns in the values.yaml for the dcae-cloudify-manager chart to change the namespace.

I would not combine the namespace change with the rename of the inputs file.  They are independent and very different changes.
Uploaded patch set 4.

Patch Set 4:

This is ready to be merged.  We tested in DCAE's own OOM deployment.  Thanks Jack!
Patch Set 5: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

looks good - did not personally pull/test

Patch Set 2:

> (1 comment)

I have pulled code and testing it now.

Patch Set 5:

> (1 comment)

Hi Lusheng,
Even if not in this commit, it is important to remove the hard-coded nexus3.onap.org references here. When we use cache docker repo, these parameter have to be overridden and it is not trivial. Better template this parameter value using "common.registry"

Patch Set 5:

Borislav, yes i have a fix for that, verified in SB00 already.  Just waiting for this one to be merged.  Everything  waits for this one.
